description: Implement evaluate(expr: str) -> int that evaluates a mathematical expression string containing non-negative integers, +, -, *, / (integer division, truncate toward zero), and parentheses. Operator precedence must be respected: * and / before + and -. Parentheses override precedence. No spaces in input. No unary minus. All intermediate results and inputs fit in a 32-bit signed integer. Do not use eval().
